creator: lx@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello, 

I am reluctant to commit a release that was never officially announced 
by the development team, and is not available for download from the 
website, especially as the newer versions of SCIM have been very 
buggy and difficult to port. Some people are looking at improving 
SCIM support of FreeBSD, but until then, I'm wary of having the 
scim-tables be an unreleased version while we have to stay on the 
old version of SCIM itself. Is there a compelling feature with this 
release that benefit users? 

Cheers, 
David
